---
title: "test_cognitive_router_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_cognitive_router_empire.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 7.22
overall_score: 4.38
---

## Intent
The `test_cognitive_router_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_router, test_route_intent_success, test_route_intent_loki_mode_override, test_route_intent_shield_trip, test_route_intent_lease_collision. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_router, test_route_intent_success, test_route_intent_loki_mode_override, test_route_intent_shield_trip, test_route_intent_lease_collision. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.cognitive_router](file://src.core.engine.cognitive_router)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)
- [src.core.engine.heimdall_shield](file://src.core.engine.heimdall_shield)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)

### Exports
- `mock_router`
- `test_route_intent_success`
- `test_route_intent_loki_mode_override`
- `test_route_intent_shield_trip`
- `test_route_intent_lease_collision`
